name: CombatMeter
description: Real-time party DPS/HPS meter with role colours.
author: Stellar

added: Team voice mic icon per party-focus row (muted / active / speaking).
Ready-check vote tint on member name; clears on phase end.
Leader team actions in row context menu (Punctuate, Convene, ReadyCheck).
Vertical HP/DPS spine on meter rows (Off / Hp / Dps mode, configurable width).
Location pin icon in party-focus row header.
fixed: Sticky entity name/spec cache survives AOI exits and scene changes.
Window minimum width (500 px) now enforced on programmatic resizes.
